articles.title: Oil Price Today (March 24): Crude oil reclaims $100 despite Donald Trump postponing attack on Iranian energy. Here’s why
articles.description: Oil prices climbed Tuesday as supply worries returned. Iran denied talks with the US, contradicting President Trump's statements. Brent crude rose to $101 a barrel, and WTI to $89.71. This rebound follows Monday's sharp selloff. Concerns over the Strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping route, persist. Disruptions continue to impact energy infrastructure in the region.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices on 24 March: Check fuel rates in your city today — Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, others
articles.description: On Monday, Trump claimed that talks were underway between US and Iran, and said that he would hold off on strikes against Iran's power plants. Following Trump's comments, the price of Brent Crude dipped below $100 before rising to $103. Check petrol, diesel prices in your city on Tuesday, 24 March.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI (M) accepts five-seat offer, signs pact with DMK
articles.description: The CPI (M), which was allotted six seats in the last Assembly elections in the same alliance, sought double-digit seats from the DMK but was denied due to the entry of more parties in the alliance

articles.title: Sattankulam custodial deaths: Family wants strong punishment for convicted policemen

topStories.title: Petrol, diesel prices on 24 March: Check fuel rates in your city today — Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, others
topStories.description: On Monday, Trump claimed that talks were underway between US and Iran, and said that he would hold off on strikes against Iran's power plants. Following Trump's comments, the price of Brent Crude dipped below $100 before rising to $103. Check petrol, diesel prices in your city on Tuesday, 24 March.

topStories.title: Ultimatums, diplomacy and a trip to Graceland as Trump eyes a deal with Iran
topStories.description: America may be a nation at war, but the president's activities have been a mix of diplomacy and diversions - with the occasional swing toward the surreal.

topStories.title: Oil Price Today (March 24): Crude oil reclaims $100 despite Donald Trump postponing attack on Iranian energy. Here’s why
topStories.description: Oil prices climbed Tuesday as supply worries returned. Iran denied talks with the US, contradicting President Trump's statements. Brent crude rose to $101 a barrel, and WTI to $89.71. This rebound follows Monday's sharp selloff. Concerns over the Strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping route, persist. Disruptions continue to impact energy infrastructure in the region.

topStories.title: Texas oil refinery in flames after explosion
topStories.description: Videos show flames and a plume of thick smoke following an explosion at a Valero oil refinery in Port Arthur, Texas.

topStories.title: US bans new foreign-made consumer internet routers
topStories.description: There are almost no major brands of internet routers that are manufactured in the US.

topStories.title: Rebel enters fray amid row over Congress’s choice of candidate in Davangere South bypoll
topStories.description: A Congress by-election in Davangere South faces backlash over candidate choice, prompting a rebel run by Sadiq Pailwan amid minority community discontent.

topStories.title: Oil Dips To Below $100-Level On Conflicting War Signals From US And Iran
topStories.description: Brent crude closed just under $100 on Monday after a steep double-digit fall, while US benchmark West Texas Intermediate hovered near the $90-per-barrel mark for June contracts.

topStories.title: US Stock Futures Slip, Dollar And Oil Advance: Markets Wrap
topStories.description: Brent crude rose 2% to almost $102 a barrel.

topStories.title: US-Iran war to end on 9 April? Israeli media claims ‘target date’ set as Tehran ‘reviews’ Washington's proposals
topStories.description: Israeli media reported that the US had set 9 April as the ‘target date’ to end the war with Iran, while US media reported that Tehran had received a message from American mediators as a pre-cursor to talks and was ‘reviewing’ them. The development comes after Trump claimed talks were underway.

topStories.title: US-Israel-Iran War Live News Updates:
topStories.description: US President Trump extended the deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, delaying strikes on Iranian power plants by five days amid ongoing tensions.

topStories.title: Markets set for 3–4% relief rally amid cooling war risks
topStories.description: Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn on Monday, with major indices falling sharply and erasing substantial market value. This decline was attributed to escalating West Asian hostilities and global uncertainties. However, a potential relief rally is anticipated for Tuesday following conciliatory remarks from the US President regarding Iran.

topStories.title: Senate approves Trump loyalist Markwayne Mullin as next DHS secretary
topStories.description: Markwayne Mullin was confirmed Department of Homeland Security secretary, placing the Oklahoma senator in charge of a Trump administration immigration crackdown that has triggered a 37-day funding shutdown of the cabinet agency.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court disposes plea seeking release of Sonam Wangchuk
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court on Monday closed as “infructuous” a petition seeking the release of climate activist Sonam Wangchuk, after the Centre revoked his detention under the National Security Act (NSA) on March 14.

dailyNews.title: US Senate confirms Markwayne Mullin as homeland security chief
dailyNews.description: The US senator will now oversee the embattled department after a series of immigration enforcement blunders.

dailyNews.title: White House Eyes Iran Parliament Speaker As Potential Pro-US Leader: Report
dailyNews.description: Ghalibaf is seen by at least some in the White House as a workable partner who could lead Iran and negotiate with the Trump administration in the war's next phase, the report said.

dailyNews.title: Backchannel begins? US sends Iran message via mediators as Trump signals deal
dailyNews.description: Backchannel begins US sends Iran message via mediators as Trump signals deal

dailyNews.title: Arvind Sanger Sees 5-7% Correction Despite Trump Hinting At Iran War De-Escalation
dailyNews.description: He expects domestic consumption and financials to suffer but also sees better recovery once the Strait of Hormuz has been opened and oil supplies normalise.

dailyNews.title: Iran US News Live Updates: Tehran now says it's 'reviewing' a US proposal, hours after denying talks with Trump
dailyNews.description: Iran US News Live Updates: A senior Iranian Foreign Ministry official has confirmed that Tehran received a US proposal via mediators and is reviewing it, according to CBS News. Catch LIVE updates with Mint

dailyNews.title: Trying relentlessly to lessen impact of US-Iran war: PM Modi
dailyNews.description: In a statement in Lok Sabha – his first after the war broke out – Modi called the attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz as “unacceptable”.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court weighs public good in post-facto environmental nod debate
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court on Monday observed that the legislature should not be completely “denuded” from granting environmental clearances (EC) to development projects long after they have commenced work, particularly when such a decision leads to serving a higher public good such as establishment of a hospital or a public utility.

dailyNews.title: Dow Jones Jumps 631 Points, S&P 500 Rallies After Trump Says US,  Iran Held Talks
dailyNews.description: The reversal came after Trump had given Iran until Monday evening New York time to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: Tehran says Trump’s peace talk claims are ‘fake news’
dailyNews.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard calls Trump a 'deceitful American president', accuses him of 'contradictory behaviour'.

dailyNews.title: Iran Has Agreed It "Will Not Have A Nuclear Weapon": Trump
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday said Iran has agreed not to possess a nuclear weapon....

dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump says ‘there’s a very good chance of a deal’ to end the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Macron says Lebanon’s fight is ‘just’ amid escalating attacks by Israel
dailyNews.description: France’s president Emmanuel Macron said Lebanon’s fight against threats to its security is ‘just’.

dailyNews.title: Moment missile strikes shortly after Israeli president’s visit
dailyNews.description: Shortly after a news conference, Israel's president was forced to take cover as a missile struck nearby.

dailyNews.title: Carville unloads on Maher, tells him to ‘get your head out of Bari Weiss’s a--’ in heated Trump rant
dailyNews.description: James Carville fires back at Bill Maher and reacts to Trump’s comments on Robert Mueller on Politicon podcast.

dailyNews.title: Department of Education under Trump just took its 'largest' step closer to shutting down
dailyNews.description: Student loan operations from a nearly $1.7 trillion portfolio are being transferred from the Department of Education to the Treasury under a new interagency agreement.

dailyNews.title: Obama adviser reveals private conversations urging Biden not to run in 2016
dailyNews.description: The University of Virginia’s Miller Center published an interview with Obama strategist David Plouffe, who was tasked with informing Biden that he should not run for president in 2016.

dailyNews.title: Mullin confirmed as DHS chief as lawmakers near solution on shutdown standoff
dailyNews.description: Even with a new DHS chief, Senate Democrats aren't backing down from their demands for stringent reforms to ICE. And now President Donald Trump wants to pair funding with voter ID legislation.

dailyNews.title: Political traffic signals: waiting for the light to change on the Hill
dailyNews.description: Congress faces a steep political battle over a $200 billion Iran war spending request, with Trump sending mixed signals on whether the funds are needed.

dailyNews.title: Trump's death will be 'like Mardi Gras in New Orleans,' Charlamagne warns after Mueller post
dailyNews.description: Radio host Charlamagne Tha God warned President Donald Trump that people will celebrate his death "like Mardi Gras" after he celebrated Robert Mueller's death.

dailyNews.title: Trump postpones strikes on Iran's power plants after "productive conversations"
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media said there was no "direct or indirect communication" with President Trump, but a senior Iranian official later indicated they'd received communication from a mediator.
